summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in colocation and power layers, led by Maharashtra, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, and Karnataka, with policy tailwinds from state data centre policies and power open access. The top India policy hook is the UP Data Centre Policy 2026 targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment. Value-chain movers include hyperscalers expanding capacity and investors like Blackstone and Brookfield anchoring large-scale commitments. Foreign hyperscalers are actively scaling in India, with Amazon leading at $48 billion, followed by Microsoft, Google, and AWS.

top_plays.headline: Nxtra plans 1GW data centre expansion in Maharashtra and Uttar Pradesh amid revenue growth
top_plays.why_now: Nxtra's revenue up 17% to ₹2,430 crore in FY26 (news, 2026-07-20) and plans to quadruple capacity to 1GW (news, 2026-07-20) align with Maharashtra's mature ecosystem (state hook) and Uttar Pradesh's cabinet-approved 2026 AI-ready incentives (policy, 2026-07-06).
top_plays.state_hook: Maharashtra: Mature Mumbai/Navi Mumbai ecosystem plus strong legal/economic policy detail. — Uttar Pradesh: Aggressive NCR/inland cluster incentives moving toward multi-city AI-ready scale. (policy High for 2021; medium-high for cabinet-approved 2026 direction; execution High-medium; gap: 2026 offic

top_plays.headline: NTT DATA commits $1.5B for AI data center expansion in Maharashtra and Uttar Pradesh
top_plays.why_now: NTT DATA committed $1.5B over three years for India AI data center expansion (news, 2026-07-20) and launched AI-driven cooling POC with Daikin (news, 2026-07-07), matching Maharashtra's strong policy/execution and Uttar Pradesh's cabinet-approved 2026 AI-ready incentives (policy, 2026-07-06).
top_plays.state_hook: Maharashtra: Mature Mumbai/Navi Mumbai ecosystem plus strong legal/economic policy detail. — Uttar Pradesh: Aggressive NCR/inland cluster incentives moving toward multi-city AI-ready scale. (policy High for 2021; medium-high for cabinet-approved 2026 direction; execution High-medium; gap: 2026 offic

watchlist.note: Watch for site selection in Uttar Pradesh or Maharashtra; trigger: official GO onboarding of India infra head (news, 2026-07-16) and $30B AirTrunk investment plan (news, 2026-06-05) need state-level policy confirmation.

items.reason: HCLTech's first India-owned data centre in Odisha targeting AI workloads signals cross-border tech expansion and new asset build.
HCLTech's first India-owned data centre in Bhubaneswar with Rs 730 Cr investment marks new asset build in Odisha.
HCLTech likely to build first India data centre in Odisha's Bhubaneswar with ₹730 crore AI-optimised facility.
HCLTech likely to build its first India data centre in Odisha's Bhubaneswar per Business Standard report.
HCLTech plans first India-owned data centre in Bhubaneswar with Rs 730 Cr investment per BW Businessworld.
Ping Identity launches India data centre to support local hosting and AI innovation, indicating new asset build.
Ping Identity launches India data centre to support local hosting and AI innovation per Express Computer.
Saudi Arabia leads AI race per International Data Center Authority head, signaling regional AI infrastructure push.
MGX, AIP and BlackRock’s GIP close $40B Aligned Data Centres deal, signaling major cross-border investment.
MGX, AIP and BlackRock’s GIP close $40B acquisition of Aligned Data Centres, major cross-border investment.
Gujarat's new data centre policy signals AI infrastructure push, relevant to BD opportunities in data centre expansion and policy engagement.
